question: What is the position of the ball in the image? Select from the following options: (A) It is not visible in the image. (B) It is on the ground near the players. (C) It is in the air heading towards the goal post. (D) It is already in the net.
gold_answer: It is not visible in the image
answer_choices: It is not visible in the image
It is on the ground near the players
It is in the air heading towards the goal post
It is already in the net
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
